amount.description: An object containing the amount of the grant, in [minor units](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/currency-codes).

balances.description: An object containing the details of the existing grant.

counterparty.description: An object containing the details of the receiving party of the grant. Setting either an `accountHolderId`, `balanceAccountId`, or both is required.

fee.description: An object containing the fee currency and value, in [minor units](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/currency-codes).

grantAccountId.description: The identifier of the grant account used for the grant.

grantOfferId.description: The identifier of the grant offer that has been selected and from which the grant details will be used.

id.description: The identifier of the grant reference.

repayment.description: An object containing the details of the 30-day repayment threshold.

status.description: The current status of the grant. Possible values: **Pending**, **Active**, **Repaid**.
